reviews.comment:
Horrible atención.... 26 autos para dos playeros...no dan abasto...el propietario podría poner unos mangos más y contratar gente

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service... 26 cars for two attendants... they can't keep up... the owner could put in a little more money and hire more people

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos 15 minutos esperando que nos atiendan, y los empleados nunca se dignaron a salir a avisar que demorarian o que pasó.  Nos guimos sin abastecer. Cero delicadeza

(Translated by Google)
We waited 15 minutes to be served, and the employees never bothered to come out and let us know there would be a delay or what was happening. We left without any supplies. Complete lack of consideration.
